text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real DrugChat paper exists at arXiv:2309.03907 with the title "DrugChat: Towards Enabling ChatGPT-Like Capabilities on Drug Molecule **Graphs**" (not "Data"), authored by Youwei Liang, Ruiyi Zhang, Li Zhang, and Pengtao Xie — none of whom match the six cited authors (Zhen Liang, Xu Yang, Qiang Liu, Bin He, Suyang Zheng, Bo Tang). The cited arXiv ID (2304.02285) also points to an entirely different paper. This is a classic hallucinated reference: a near-real title grafted onto fabricated authors and a wrong arXiv ID.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.03907
